---
title: "GMS-Valid Hexagrams"
subtitle: "21 stable hexagram pages inside X_6"
listing:
  - id: gms-valid-hexagrams
    contents: "hexagram-*.md"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, description]
---

## Stable Core

The strongest per-hexagram expansion starts with the `21` GMS-valid hexagrams:

`X_6 = {w ∈ {0,1}^6 : No11(w)}`

These pages now combine three layers at once: the hexagram's binary word, its theorem-level Omega anchors, and compact source-text excerpts from the local `texts/yijing` corpus.

## Why This Layer Matters

The 12 category essays establish the major thematic corridors. These `21` pages move one level deeper: they show exactly which individual stable hexagrams already sit inside the admissible Omega domain without first requiring fold.

:::{#gms-valid-hexagrams}
:::

---

[Back to All 64 Hexagrams](../hexagrams/index.qmd) | [Back to I Ching Index](../index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../../index.qmd)
